query:
SELECT comment_id  AS "comment_id!: Uuid",
                   emoji       AS "emoji!: String",
                   COUNT(*)    AS "count!: i64",
                   bool_or(user_id = $2) AS "user_reacted!: bool"
            FROM   task_reactions
            WHERE  comment_id = ANY($1)
            GROUP  BY comment_id, emoji
            ORDER  BY emoji
